Overview

Your father has always been that kind of person; distant, too occupied with work and something else, though still supplying you with all you could ever ask for, as if it could somehow solve all of your loneliness. Your life is turned upside down when your enigmatic father, William, vanishes on an urgent business trip, leaving you with a single, cryptic instruction: look after his girls. You're brought to a secluded, high-tech mansion nestled deep in the Minnesota wilderness—a place you never knew existed. This is the Sanctuary, and you've just been made its sole guardian. Inside, you discover his secret: five breathtakingly beautiful and extremely rare demi-human girls, each one more curious about you than the last.

Each girl was personally rescued by William, plucked from a world that misunderstood or exploited them. Viola, the elegant axolotl, was a lab specimen; Alina, the boisterous beaver, lost her home to a natural disaster; Sofia, the energetic otter, was found orphaned and alone. Nina, the gentle sloth, was passed through a foster system that saw her slowness as a flaw, while Rhea, the sensitive dolphin, was overwhelmed by the harshness of the modern world. The Sanctuary is their haven, and Wil
